name: @stone-js/lab
description: Living, runnable proof that every Stone.js feature works (API, SPA, SSR, SSG, telemetry dashboard). Also a starter provider.
author: Mr. Stone <evensstone@gmail.com>

starters.title: REST API — declarative, TypeScript (lab)
starters.description: Real REST API: routing, regex params, JSON responses, 404s. Decorators + TS.

starters.title: REST API — declarative, JavaScript (lab)
starters.description: The same REST API in vanilla JS (decorators preserved, types stripped).

starters.title: REST API — imperative, TypeScript (lab)
starters.description: The same REST API with the define* meta-module API instead of decorators.

starters.title: REST API — imperative, JavaScript (lab)
starters.description: The imperative REST API in vanilla JS — the 4th corner of the matrix.

starters.title: React SPA — client-side rendering (lab)
starters.description: React SPA: multi-page routing, StoneLink navigation, CSR. Same pages as ssr/ssg.

starters.title: React SSR — server-side rendering (lab)
starters.description: React SSR with client hydration (isomorphic). Same pages as spa/ssg.

starters.title: React SSG — static site generation (lab)
starters.description: React SSG: routes pre-rendered to static HTML + client hydration. Same pages as spa/ssr.

starters.title: React SPA — CSR, imperative (lab)
starters.description: The SPA built with the imperative define* API instead of decorators. 1:1 with apps/spa.

starters.title: React SSR — imperative (lab)
starters.description: The SSR app built with the imperative define* API. 1:1 with apps/ssr.

starters.title: React SSG — imperative (lab)
starters.description: The SSG app built with the imperative define* API. 1:1 with apps/ssg.

starters.title: Security & runtime metrics dashboard (lab)
starters.description: Consumes @stone-js/telemetry: spans every request, aggregates in a shared exporter, renders a live HTML dashboard + JSON metrics API.
